name: I Follow Jesus
subtitle: What does it mean to follow Jesus?
description: Eight weeks walking with Jesus through the Gospels — understanding who He is, what He taught, and how to follow Him.
mainTruth: Following Jesus means loving God, loving people, and living differently.
outcomes: Can explain who Jesus is in their own words
Has 3-4 memorised verses from Jesus' teaching
Can pray conversationally, not just recite
Understands the Gospel narrative: birth to resurrection
Has identified one way they want to follow Jesus this week
completionMessage: Eight stories. Eight weeks. You know who Jesus is now — not just the stories, but the person. He loves you. He knows your name. And you can follow Him every day.
parentNote: This journey gives your child a Gospel-shaped faith: they know Jesus was born, lived, taught, died, and rose again — and that all of it was for them.
